name: message_create_stream
description: Send a conversation to Claude and receive the response as a stream of server-sent events for real-time token-by-token display. Uses the same endpoint as message_create with stream=true.

parameters.name: messages
parameters.description: Array of message objects with alternating user/assistant roles.

parameters.name: max_tokens
parameters.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate.

parameters.name: stream
parameters.description: Must be set to true for streaming.

parameters.name: system
parameters.description: System prompt for context and instructions.
